title: The Pair Finds a Plan
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on the pair finds a plan, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Pair Finds a Plan. Usopp and Chopper face Mr. 4 and Miss Merry Christmas, turning fear and teamwork into a real battle. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If there's one thing I learned while on that ship...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then it's the foolishness of giving up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, you wanna know about what happened here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, we successfully managed to lure one of the enemies here,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: He beat us in 2 seconds flat.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 4
dialogue.text: Step the hell up for God's sake!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But what're you doing here, Samji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The ducks you were riding on came to me for help!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: So then... That means Mr. 2 got away, right?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If we don't hurry, the rebellion will only get worse!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's wrong? Hurry up and get on!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey now, are you doubting me!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'd heard from Mr. 0 that they all had the same band tied around their arm...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: J wonder how she found out...?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But what- ever! I won't get you escape!

summary: This part develops the pair finds a plan and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
